examples: We have a call for Mr. Harold Sabin.
"I felt I needed to do this because with my family history," Sabin says.
Sabin is one of millions of Americans who experience memory loss and may eventually be diagnosed with dementia.
In June 1961 the American Medical Association swung its support to the Sabin vaccine.
Sabin rejected this free advice and set up her own teensy publishing company, Watering Can Press.
